# Canon Authoring Checklist Template

Use this template when a future canon addition needs a compact self-applied
authoring pass.

This is a canon authoring checklist.

It does not lint, block, or enforce anything at runtime.

A filled artifact using this template is still a canon authoring checklist, not a
compliance gate.

---

## Canon Authoring Checklist: `{artifact name}`

### Artifact context

- artifact type: `{model doc | template | example | filled artifact}`
- scope statement: `{what artifact types or session types this applies to}`
- motion or governing basis: `{motion-XXXX | none}`
- prior canon inheritance: `{file-path (motion-XXXX) | none}`

### Checklist

- [ ] artifact type identified
- [ ] scope and inheritance stated
- [ ] advisory and non-executing status stated
- [ ] settled canon cited rather than redefined
- [ ] continuity phrasing present where relevant
- [ ] active work stays between settled canon and open questions where relevant
- [ ] boundary language present where relevant
- [ ] non-goals present
- [ ] risks present
- [ ] routing targets and next prompts present where relevant
- [ ] no-touch boundaries present where relevant
- [ ] template, example, and filled-artifact distinction preserved
- [ ] explicit/manual council-run boundary preserved where relevant

### Notes

- open questions: `{none | describe}`
- deferred authoring follow-up: `{none | describe}`
